title: SadJier's PlayerTracker
description: 一个可以用指南针对玩家进行追踪的模组。A mod that can track players with a compass.
body:
# SadJier's PlayerTracker

这是一个轻量的玩家追踪模组，基于原版指南针实现，无需额外前置。

## 核心功能
- 手持原版指南针对玩家右键一段时间，即可标记该玩家，标记后的指南针会持续指向目标玩家。
- 如果被标记的玩家死亡，指南针会自动解除标记，变回普通指南针。
- 使用磁石与已标记玩家的指南针合成，可制作永久追踪指南针，不受玩家死亡影响。
- 标记的持续时长可在游戏配置文件中自由调整。
- 本模组的指南针可以应用于机械动力:航空学的导航台。
- 使用/playertracker <玩家名称> <是否永久>可以获取指向该玩家的指针
- 将指向玩家的指针与磁石合成可以获得永久指针

---
# SadJier's PlayerTracker

A lightweight player tracking mod based on the vanilla compass, no additional dependencies required.

## Features
- Right-click on a player with a vanilla compass for a short time to mark them. The compass will then point to the marked player.
- If the marked player dies, the compass will lose its target and revert to a normal compass.
- Combine a marked compass with a lodestone in a crafting grid to create a permanent tracking compass, which will no longer lose its target on player death.
- The duration of the temporary mark can be adjusted in the mod's configuration file.
- The compass of this module can be applied to Create: Aeronautics' Navigation table.
- Using/layertracker<player name><permanent>can obtain a compass to the player
- Synthesize the compass pointing to the player with a lodestone to obtain a permanent compass
